content.en:
"The Extreme Dao True River will actually take out the Extreme Dao Tablet for the other Three Realms Perfect Controllers to comprehend!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

However, this was indeed an opportunity for him, and if he saw the Extreme Dao Monument, he could copy it.

Moreover, this time you can see more than one Yakuza Monument!

But this time, he didn't know exactly what the forces on the side of the Extreme Dao True River were going to do.

Soon, Ye Tian met with the Lord of the Ancient and the Lord of the Daoless.

Among the Daoless Towers, there are only a few perfect controllers of the Three Realms who have comprehended the Perfection Extreme, and the four Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers plus the Lord of the Seventh Tower, Lord Luofu, and Ye Tian.

A total of six tower masters have comprehended the extreme path of the consummation realm, and the other tower masters have not comprehended the extreme path of the consummation realm.

As for the other tower masters, such as the Lord of Tianhe, although they are already the perfect controllers of the True Realm, they have not comprehended the extreme path of the Perfection Realm, and they are still a little behind.

But even if it's just a little bit, it still doesn't meet the conditions.

"Lord of the Ancients, what's the situation on the other side of the Extreme Dao True River, and why did you issue such a mission?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

At this time, the Lord of Canggu said: "The forces on the other side of the Extreme Dao True River want to urge a formation, attract the energy of the Primordial Black Sea, and transform the entire Extreme Dao True River. Once the transformation is successful, the Yakuza River may transform into an environment similar to the Yakuza Deep Sea. "

"It's impossible to become a place like the Extreme Deep Sea?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"It's really impossible!" The Lord of the Infinite Dao said: "The Extreme Dao Deep Sea is an irreproducible existence, and the forces on the other side of the Extreme Dao True River are only imitating the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, so that the Extreme Dao True River can give birth to some Extreme Dao treasures and even Extreme Dao Exotic Treasures in the future, even if it is only one-tenth of the level of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, that is enough!" At present, although the end of our realm is countless times the area of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, the resources are still scarce, the focus is on the lack of Extreme Dao treasure resources, and we can only plunder some Extreme Dao resources from some specific ruins, or sneak into the Extreme Dao Deep Sea to steal resources. But this is all a palliative rather than a cure, so the forces on the other side of the Extreme Dao True River are thinking about transforming the Extreme Dao True River, and if it is successful, it can be extended to other eternal worlds. "

"Aren't they afraid of failure?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Pathless Dao said: "Many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers have deduced it, and the success rate is very high, but it takes a lot of Three Realm Perfect Masters who have comprehended the Perfection Realm to urge the formation, and the number of Three Realm Perfect Controllers who have comprehended the Perfection Extreme Path on the Extreme Dao True River is not enough, so let's help." "

"This transformation will take a long time, and it is estimated that it will take five billion eternal years. The Lord of the Ancients said.

Five billion eternal years were not a long time for them, but it was impossible for them to send both the ontology and the clone of the will.

Otherwise, if there is a problem with their own forces, no one can afford to take this responsibility.

If it weren't for the benefits given by the Extreme Dao True River, no one in the Three Realms Perfect Controller would be willing to help.

"I'm going to help!"

Ye Tian expressed his decision.

"Let's also go to help, after all, if the Extreme Dao True River really succeeds, maybe one day our Eternal Ruins will do the same, so if we don't help this time, it is impossible for the Extreme Dao True River to come to help in the future. The Lord of the Pathless said.

After discussion, the six Three Realms Perfect Masters of the Daoless Tower all decided to help.

However, the Lord of the Daoless only sent a will clone, and Ye Tian decided to send a copy body and a will clone.

Now, several tower masters of the Daoless Tower knew that Ye Tian had more than one real body, so it was naturally no problem to send two bodies to help.

......

Extreme True River.

One after another True Realm Perfect Controllers and Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers came here from all over the Realm, but there was only one Void Realm Perfect Controller, Ye Tian.

After all, other powerhouses who have comprehended the Perfection Extreme Path are at least the perfect controllers of the Void Realm, and it is really too rare for cultivators like Ye Tian to comprehend the Perfection Extreme Path, but still stay in the Perfect Masters of the Void Realm.

Not to mention this era, even in the past, I'm afraid I can't find a few!

This time, almost half of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the Edge of the Realm have come here, and there is no such opportunity in normal times.

Soon, the Lord of the Ancient Realm introduced Ye Tian to a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, at least he had to know who the other party was.

"There are actually five Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

This time it's the right time, these five cultivators with the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment are all demons, one of them is the perfect controller of the True Realm, and the other four are the perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm.

These five Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments are the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment of Water, the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment of Fire, the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment of Earth, the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment of Gold, and the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment of Destruction.

"It's not bad, it's all the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu that I don't have!"

Ye Tian was quite satisfied, copied all these Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, and fused them all when he turned around.

Soon.

The Lord of the White Night, the Lord of the Golden Body, and the Lord of Destruction of the Extreme Dao True River came out one after another, and Ye Tian's Golden Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu was copied from this Golden Body Lord, and the Destruction Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu was copied from the Lord of Destruction.

The Lord of the White Night, the Lord of the Golden Body, and the Lord of Destruction are the three most powerful Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao True River, with the Lord of the Golden Body being the most powerful.

The Lord of the Golden Body stood up and said, "Thank you for coming to my Extreme True River to help, this time is an attempt by our Extreme True River, if it is successful, it can benefit the entire realm." I won't say anything superfluous, I'll tell you about the area of the circle you are responsible for, and after assigning it, I will give you the control of the circle. "

Subsequently, each of the Three Realms Perfect Masters said which kind of Perfection Extreme Realm they had mastered.

And Ye Tian was also relatively low-key, he didn't say that he had mastered so many consummation poles, he only said one, that is, the space pole path.

As a result, Ye Tian was divided into the Spatial Extreme Dao Array.

After a while, Ye Tian obtained the control authority of part of the magic circle, and once the magic circle was opened, he would need to control the magic circle with the spatial pole.

"The area that each Three Realms controller is responsible for is different, and the mysteries of the magic circle mastered are only a small part, if you want to obtain the method of arranging the entire magic circle, unless you have to pay a huge price, the Extreme Dao True River will not teach it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So even if it succeeds this time, it will be impossible for other Eternal Heavens and Realms to transform their own Eternal Heavens and Realms in a short period of time, unless they are willing to give huge benefits to the Extreme Dao True River, they will give it.

Not only did he think of it, but the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers definitely thought of it, but they still had to help.

Besides, this help is not for nothing, there are benefits, so naturally they won't say anything.

After a long time, all the perfect controllers of the Three Realms were in place.

"Everyone, I'm going to urge the magic circle later, it's up to you!"

The voice of the Lord of the Golden Body spread throughout the entire Extreme Dao True River, and all the perfect controllers of the Three Realms heard it.

"Let's go!"

With this sound, all the Three Realms Perfect Controllers urged the Perfection Extreme Dao to start manipulating the magic circle.
